codeReview.summary: The worker successfully copied three admin components (BooksManagement.tsx, QRManagement.tsx, ExcelMigration.tsx) and the QRManagement.print.css file to the librarian folder. All files are identical copies of the source admin components. TypeScript compilation passes with no errors, confirming imports resolve correctly. The feature description mentioned updating internal labels from 'Admin' to 'Librarian' where relevant, but no such labels exist in the source files - the components use generic labels like 'Books Management', 'QR Code Management', and 'Excel Migration'.

summary: PASS: All assertions VAL-FRONTEND-001 through VAL-FRONTEND-005 are satisfied. Files exist at expected locations, imports are correct, TypeScript compiles successfully, and components can be imported without errors. VAL-FRONTEND-006 (render without critical console errors) requires browser-based testing which is out of scope for this code review. The implementation is a clean file copy operation with no issues found.
